review_notes: The functions are generally well-aligned with the control's intent to analyze communication traffic anomalies. However, the naming for the service mesh function was adjusted to better reflect the focus on anomaly detection rather than general monitoring.
naming_improvements: Use 'anomaly_detection' instead of 'traffic_monitoring' for service mesh to emphasize anomaly detection
title: System Monitoring | Analyze Communications Traffic Anomalies
step1_reasoning: The control SI-4 (11) focuses on analyzing communications traffic anomalies, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through network policy monitoring, audit logging of network traffic anomalies, and service mesh traffic monitoring. Kubernetes NetworkPolicies can be used to define allowed traffic patterns, and deviations from these patterns can be considered anomalies. Audit logs can capture network traffic anomalies if configured properly. Service meshes like Istio can provide detailed traffic monitoring and anomaly detection capabilities.
